arts.ttl: Burnley man pens new contract before joining League One outfit on loan
arts.sum: Dara Costelloe has put pen to paper on a new contract for Burnley – before sealing a loan move to League One side Northampton Town.

arts.ttl: Burnley's Maxime Esteve stance clarified after talk of late deadline day bid from Tottenham
arts.sum: Reports suggesting Tottenham Hotpsur have launched a late deadline day bid for Burnley’s Maxime Esteve are wide of the mark, the Burnley Express understands.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur make 11th hour £20m bid for Burnley star

arts.ttl: Tottenham offer £20m to Burnley for Maxime Estève – Clarets want 50% more
arts.sum: French newspaper L’Equipe have a scoop on a late Tottenham Hotspur attempt to sign Maxime Estève from Burnley. According to the French newspaper, Spurs have presented a deadline day offer worth £20m to the Championship club in an attempt to take the player immediately. That £20m offer has been immediately rejected by Burnley who have The post Tottenham offer £20m to Burnley for Maxime Estève – Clarets want 50% more appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Tottenham offer €24 million to Burnley for Maxime Estève
arts.sum: According to a report from L’Équipe journalist Loïc Tanzi, Tottenham have sent a €26 million offer to Burnley FC for Maxime Estève (22). However, the Championship side are holding out…

arts.ttl: John Egan explains Hull City move after Burnley deadline day departure is confirmed
arts.sum: John Egan’s deadline day move to Burnley’s fellow Championship side Hull City has now been confirmed

arts.ttl: Former Sheffield United star joins Hull City in late transfer deadline day deal
arts.sum: The Republic of Ireland international and United skipper picked up an Achilles injury at West Ham in October 2023, which ended his season prematurely and came as a huge blow to Chris Wilder's Blades last term, who went on to get relegated from the top-flight, and after moving to Turf Moor in the summer following his departure from the Steel City, Egan has played only seven times under Scott Parker. Throughout what has been a hugely disappointing campaign, City have struggled defensively, and while they've kept three clean sheets in their last three away wins, including that thumping 3-0 success at Egan's former club last Friday night, Saturday's 2-1 home loss to Stoke City exposed their weaknesses, especially at home, and Selles will hope Egan's arrival can help cut out those errors which have blighted their campaign.
